label: 数列
description: 生成从 start 到 end 的等间距数值序列，可选添加前缀生成字符串序列
description-en: Generate an evenly-spaced numeric sequence from start to end. Optionally prepend a prefix to produce a string sequence.
icon: 一个从左到右排列的递增数字序列 1 2 3 ... N，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色蓝灰两色

inputs.name: step
inputs.label: 步长
inputs.description: 相邻元素的间距，必须大于 0
inputs.description-en: Spacing between consecutive elements; must be > 0.

inputs.name: prefix
inputs.label: 前缀
inputs.description: 字符串前缀。非空时输出带前缀的字符串序列
inputs.description-en: String prefix. When non-empty, stringList output is generated with the prefix.

outputs.name: stringList
outputs.label: 文本列
outputs.description: 带前缀的一维字符串序列
outputs.description-en: Generated rank-1 string sequence with prefix.

outputs.name: count
outputs.label: 数量
outputs.description-en: Total number of elements in the sequence.
